div1.entryFree:
Bountiful, 1) liberal: if that one be prodigal, b. they will him call, Pilgr. 412. b. Fortune, Tp. I, 2, 178. As I, 2, 37. H4A III, 1, 168. Tim. III, 1, 11. Tim. III, 1, 11
2) of rich contents, full of meaning: that's a b. answer that fits all questions, All's II, 2, 15.
Used adverbially: and give it b. to the desirers, Cor. II, 3, 109.
